Very disappointing experience with Urban Company. After my first AC service, the AC started leaking water within days because the outdoor unit wasn't serviced properly, forcing me to pay for another visit. Later, I booked a technician only for a wiring issue as the AC wasn't turning on properly or cooling. Instead, they added an unnecessary AC Service Lite and charged extra despite my AC already being serviced twice. Poor workmanship, unnecessary upselling, and lack of transparency.
